tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address
> edit "C2-203.0.113.1"
> set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
> next
> end
> 
>

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom
> edit "TCP_8443"
> set tcp-portrange 8443
> next
> end
> 
>

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 1
config utm
set dlp-log enable
set av enable
set ips enable
set webfilter enable
end
set dstaddr "all"
set service "ALL"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy
> edit 1
> config utm
> set dlp-log enable
> set av enable
> set ips enable
> set webfilter enable
> end
> set dstaddr "all"
> set service "ALL"
> next
> end
> 
>

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config ips custom
edit "block_multipart"
config entries
edit 1
set action block
set status enable
set protocol tcp
set pattern "multipart/form-data"
set pattern-type simple
next
end
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config ips custom
> edit "block_multipart"
> config entries
> edit 1
> set action block
> set status enable
> set protocol tcp
> set pattern "multipart/form-data"
> set pattern-type simple
> next
> end
> next
> end
> 
>
